title: Product-Market Fit Evidence
promise: PMF evidence diagnostic separating fit evidence from enthusiasm, growth, and temporary demand.
audience: Startup founders, product leaders, growth teams, accelerators, and early-stage investors
description: Evidence maturity assessment across Retention & Behaviour, Demand Pull & Willingness to Pay, Segment Clarity, Repeatable Acquisition. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: PMF evidence diagnostic separating fit evidence from enthusiasm, growth, and temporary demand.
